series_metadata.series_description: As of 01/21/2018 the Ohio State Barber Board has been abolished and all active and retained schedules have moved to the State Cosmetology and Barber Board. Student Registration cards for inactive/lapsed barber students or barbers. Many of these individuals are not active and/or have never been licensed as a barber. May contain social security numbers.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 3 years then dispose, Paper: Shred
